conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I used CircleCI for our beta builds.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That got the first release out quickly.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: GitHub Actions is the CI system I use now because CircleCI parallel build costs kept climbing.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That also simplified repository permissions.

qa.question: What CI system do I use now?
What made me switch away from CircleCI?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I staffed support 24/7 at launch.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That was sensible while onboarding was rough.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: After I reviewed the ticket heatmap, I narrowed support to 9:00 to 18:00 JST on weekdays.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: The smaller schedule has been easier to sustain.

qa.question: What support window do I use now?
Which report did I review before narrowing support hours?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Starter used to cost 29 dollars a month.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That price made the first self-serve plan easy to explain.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Starter now costs 39 dollars a month because I bundled audit logs.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Customers said the extra visibility justified the increase.

qa.question: What does Starter cost now?
Which feature was added to Starter with the price change?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Free workspaces keep activity history for 30 days.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That cap keeps storage predictable.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: An enterprise prospect asked me for quarterly audit exports.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That request changed the retention discussion.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Enterprise retention is now 90 days.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Sales can position that clearly in larger deals.

qa.question: How long is enterprise retention now?
What request triggered the enterprise retention change?
qa.answer: an enterprise prospect asked for quarterly audit exports

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I planned to ship SSO and team workspaces in the same quarter.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Both were high on the roadmap.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Team workspaces shipped first because the SCIM provider contract for SSO was still being negotiated.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That dependency blocked the security rollout.

qa.question: Which shipped before the other, SSO or team workspaces?
Why was SSO delayed?
qa.answer: the SCIM provider contract was still being negotiated

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Database connections saturated during the Monday import window.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That incident hit both ingestion and reporting.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Right after the alert, I shifted read traffic to a new replica.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That bought me time to investigate.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: A composite index on workspace_id and created_at permanently reduced write latency.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Since then the import window has stayed quiet.

qa.question: What permanently reduced write latency?
qa.answer: a composite index on workspace_id and created_at

qa.question: What was my first response after the alert fired?
qa.answer: I shifted read traffic to a new replica

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I used a weighted sum for lexical and vector scores in the first retrieval version.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That setup was simple but brittle.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Reciprocal Rank Fusion is the retrieval fusion method I use now, and I apply recency after fusion.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That made the ranking much more stable.

qa.question: What retrieval fusion method do I use now?
What signal do I apply after fusion?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The docs used to be only in English.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That was acceptable while sales stayed in North America.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Japanese is the additional documentation language I support now.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: The launch playbook was the first document I translated.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: After the launch playbook, I localized the invoice emails.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Support appreciated that follow-up.

qa.question: Which language besides English do I support in the docs?
What did I localize after the launch playbook?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I used JWTs with refresh tokens in localStorage during the prototype.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That was quick to wire up but not ideal for the long term.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Session cookies backed by Redis are the authentication flow I use now, and I removed refresh tokens from localStorage.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Security review was happier after that switch.

qa.question: What authentication flow do I use now?
What did I remove during the auth migration?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: San Francisco used to be our headquarters.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That was before the team spread across Asia.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Singapore is our headquarters now, and engineering stayed remote-first.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That kept hiring flexible across time zones.

qa.question: Where is the headquarters now?
Which team stayed remote-first after the headquarters move?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The analytics dashboard used to refresh nightly.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That worked when the team only checked weekly reports.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Every five minutes is the refresh cadence I use now because customers were missing same-day funnel drops.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: The growth team checks it several times a day now.

qa.question: What is the current dashboard refresh cadence?
What problem made me replace the nightly refresh?
qa.answer: customers were missing same-day funnel drops

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: In Q2 I shipped export to CSV, audit logs, and SAML for admins.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That quarter focused on operational controls.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Export to CSV shipped first, audit logs shipped next, and SAML shipped last.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Enterprise prospects kept asking about the final SAML milestone.

qa.question: Which admin features shipped in Q2?
qa.answer: export to CSV, audit logs, and SAML

qa.question: Which feature shipped last?
